data.title: Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E is failing in real time
data.description:
The numbers are in, and Elon Musk’s so-called Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E) is already falling apart.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musks-d-o-g-e-is-failing-in-real-time/

data.title: WebKeyDao Suffers $73,000 Loss in Hacker Attack
data.description: According to Odaily, Web3 launcher platform WebKeyDao has been targeted by hackers, resulting in a loss of approximately $73,000. The attackers exploited an unprotected function to purchase wkeyDao tokens at a low price and subsequently sold them on a decentralized exchange for profit. Specifically, the hackers used a vulnerability in the contract's buy function to acquire 230 wkeyDao tokens for 1159 BUSD. They then sold these tokens on a DEX for 13,167 BUSD, achieving nearly ten times the initial investment.

data.title: BlockSec Phalcon: Web3 launcher platform WebKeyDao suffered an attack that cost about $73,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BlockSec Phalcon monitoring shows that the Web3 launcher platform WebKeyDao was hacked, resulting in a loss of about $73,000. The attacker used an unprotected function to buy wkeyDao tokens at a low price and sold them on decentralized exchanges for profit. Specifically, the attacker used the buy function in the vulnerable contract to buy 230 wkeyDao tokens with 1159 BUSD, and then sold them on DEX for 13,167 BUSD, earning about 10 times the profit.

data.title: African Currency Platform Set to Enhance Regional Trade
data.description:
According to PANews, the Pan-African Payment and Settlement System (PAPSS), supported by 15 central banks, is piloting a currency platform to enable countries to settle trade using local currencies. Reuters reports that this platform, known as the African Monetary Market, is scheduled for launch later this year. The introduction of the African currency platform is expected to boost intra-African trade.

The pilot and planned launch of the African Monetary Market coincide with efforts by some African nations to reduce reliance on the U.S. dollar. These countries argue that trading in dollars, which are often scarce, hampers trade. In 2023, Kenyan President William Ruto, who has repeatedly advocated for de-dollarization in Africa, stated that the implementation of PAPSS eliminates the need for dollars in trade settlements.

data.title: Web3 game Bombie's average paid revenue per user on TON platform exceeds $102
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the average paid revenue per user (ARPPU) of Web3 game Bombie on the TON platform has exceeded a new high of $102. Currently, Bombie has more than 11 million users on both platforms, making it one of the games with the highest ARPPU on the TON platform.
It is reported that Bombie has previously announced the token economics, and 70% of the token supply will be distributed to the community.
